font_stack: Light editorial serif for headings plus Open Sans-compatible system UI for Vietnamese body and controls
palette: Warm Old Quarter brown system with RGB semantic tokens in frontend-client/app/globals.css, frontend-admin/app/globals.css, and Tailwind semantic color mappings
motion: Restrained transform/opacity motion: 120ms press, 220ms controls, 300ms modal, 420ms disclosure maximum, reduced-motion fallback
spacing: Tailwind utility spacing with 44px minimum touch targets and 24px desktop gutters
hallmark_preserve: Light-only public/admin UI after dark mode removal
Open Sans-compatible body stack for Vietnamese readability
Existing Next.js, Django, Playwright, and Tailwind boundaries
hallmark_apply: Sharper surface hierarchy between page, filter, card, modal, and footer
Primary color reserved for CTA and active intent instead of every label
No fake metrics, fake testimonials, or fabricated proof
Representative real room imagery before brand fallback
No two-line primary buttons or cramped clickable text
Consistent loading, empty, error, and media-failure states
field_gate_policy: Hallmark can improve the interface, but physical-device checks, provider deliverability, usability sessions, production telemetry, and Core Web Vitals p75 require real evidence before PASS.
